file.libraries: {@popperjs/core, L.CQzones, L.ITUzones, L.Maidenhead, L.WorkedAllBritain, L.WorkedAllBritainIreland, eb1770b90a, jquery, jquery-csv, jquery-ui, leaflet, leaflet-edgebuffer, leaflet-extra-markers, leaflet-geometryutil, leaflet-heat, leaflet-providers, leaflet.geodesic, leaflet.vectorgrid, moment, requirejs, text-image}
